title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Prudential Life - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Prudential Life - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Prudential Life! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Prudential Life:
ICICI Prudential Life is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life!
